title: Session 27 — Eekso: The Feast (prep)
bodyText:
**TL;DR: cold open MID-INITIATIVE vs two mimics (the feast). Party is hurt, no long rest, thin slots — lethal table, real danger. Opener scene: Eekso — Session Open (S27), grouped under this session.**

> [!dm] Stub drafted by Claude 2026-07-23 alongside the opener scene — flesh out at the prep session. Everything from the S26 cliffhanger per the transcript follow-ups.

# The opener (built)
Omen (false idol — mirrors the foyer statues, never say so) → welcome → recap → straight back into initiative. Varen's turn first; he was winding up a fireball.

# In pocket after the fight
- [ ] **Scavenger's journal is UNFIRED** — drag-marks near the mimics' corner steer them to the hidden camp. "It knows how many of us there are" is their warning before the stairs down.
- [ ] **[[pc-felson|Felson]]'s blood went down the drains** — Job has it now. Free hook, unplaced (⚑ how does it surface?).
- [ ] **The garden fight is intact** — they fled it; the lure is still fishing.
- [ ] **Job's loot** ⚑ still TBD in the ritual scene.
- [ ] Threads the players flagged: opening behind the improvised wall, the stairs down, the DON'T EAT sign.

# Threads
[[eekso]] · [[session-26]] · [[grill-queue]] · [[the-pool]]
